description:
When a villain faints before he can be tortured, Izua, a doctor, rushes to his aid. While he`s there, he says he`ll check on Hela and Siu, too. Later, Mike injurs his finger and Merim, a nurse, treats it for him. Merim is a girl who speaks through her stuffed toy, Amumu, and...
Source: Crunchyroll
